Package team44.project2.controller.manager.reports

package team44.project2.controller.manager.reports
Controllers for the reporting screens accessible to managers.

Contains controllers for the sales report (aggregated revenue and quantity by item over a date range), the ordering-trends report (most popular items), the X-report (current-day running totals), and the Z-report (end-of-day totals with reset). All report screens share a common navigation menu for switching between report types.

  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    team44.project2.controller.manager
    Controllers for the manager-facing screens of the point-of-sale application.
    team44.project2.controller.manager.employees
    Controllers for the employee-management screens accessible to managers.
    team44.project2.controller.manager.inventory
    Controllers for the inventory-management screens accessible to managers.
    team44.project2.controller.manager.menu
    Controllers for the menu-management screens accessible to managers.
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    OrderingTrendsController
    Controller for the ordering-trends report screen in the manager dashboard, displaying line charts for product sales and dollar sales over a manager-selected date range, with optional log-scale Y-axis and navigation to other report screens.
    SalesReportController
    Controller for the sales-report screen in the manager dashboard, showing aggregated sales data (quantity sold and revenue) per menu item over a date range selected by the manager.
    XReportController
    Controller for the X-report screen in the manager dashboard.
    ZReportController
    Controller for the Z-report screen in the manager dashboard.
